name: Delegation Worker Result Packager
description: Normalizes a worker_task_packet plus worker outputs into a worker_result_package with task id, status, summary, outputs, artifacts, errors, followups, source refs, allowed capabilities, and budget usage.

inputSchema.name: Worker Task Packet
inputSchema.description: Delegation task packet containing task_id, goal, context refs, allowed capabilities, budget, and expected output schema.

inputSchema.name: Worker Outputs
inputSchema.description: Raw worker outputs to package by output key.

inputSchema.name: Worker Status
inputSchema.description: Worker terminal status, such as succeeded, failed, or partial.

inputSchema.name: Artifacts
inputSchema.description: Optional artifact references produced by the worker.

inputSchema.name: Budget Usage
inputSchema.description: Optional worker budget usage fields such as used_steps or used_chars.
